title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: BOB KEEFER CENTER DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. 250 S 32nd Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-8pm, Saturday 8am-5pm, Sunday noon-5pm (541) 736-4544 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 736-4544 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours; signing into the facility is required FEES: None for day space. Prices vary for fitness center, court sports, and group exercise. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BOB KEEFER CENTER
